div1.entryFree:
Dealing (cf. Double-dealing and Plain-dealing) subst. 1) proceeding, manner of acting: revealed the actor and whole manner of his d. Lucr. Arg. Err. II, 2, 89 in plain d., I shall have you whipt, Meas. II, 1, 264 (== to be plain with you). the justice of your d. IV, 2, 201. H4B II, 1, 40. H6B II, 4, 73. R3 III, 6, 14. H8 III, 1, 39. Rom. II, 4, 181. Lr. III, 3, 2. Plural --s: Merch. I, 3, 163. R3 III, 1, 49. Oth. III, 3, 260.
2) treatment: so thou wilt buy and pay and use good d. Ven. 514. you should find better d. Tw. III, 3, 18.
